description_long: This is a double bed with a dark wooden frame featuring a slatted headboard and footboard. The bed is topped with a thick, red comforter that drapes over the sides, partially concealing the mattress. Two dark gray pillows rest at the head of the bed, positioned side by side on a white sheet. The wooden frame is sturdy, with square legs and a simple, modern design. The comforter has a subtle, wavy pattern that adds visual interest to the bedding. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for a bedroom in an urban apartment or home.
description: A double bed with a dark wooden slatted frame, red comforter, and two gray pillows, exuding a modern and clean look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slatted headboard, two gray pillows, and the red comforter draped over the bed.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headboard, both pillows, and the full spread of the red comforter.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the footboard and the comforter hanging over the edge.
description_view_3: View from the foot of the bed, focusing on the slatted footboard and the red comforter covering the mattress.
